vulnerability.reference: Over-reliance on autonomous systems leads to user complacency and delayed manual takeover.
vulnerability.generated: Passengers have no real-time oversight or intervention capability when the RL model encounters unfamiliar action space configurations.

impact.reference: Collisions causing physical harm to passengers and pedestrians.
impact.generated: Passenger injuries, fatalities, and vehicle damage from inappropriate navigation actions in unseen city layouts.

dose_response.reference: In-context RL models' spurious action coupling in unseen gridworlds enables unsafe navigation, which when navigating new city layouts exposes passengers to collisions, leading to physical harm and eroded public trust.
dose_response.generated: In-context RL models coupling action selection to irrelevant features in new city layouts, through passengers in autonomous vehicles, triggers lack of real-time oversight, leading to passenger injuries, fatalities, and vehicle damage from inappropriate navigation actions.
